title: Performia
description: A Lightweight Performance Modpack, crafted for Forge, ensuring seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular modpacks, a one  stop, pitstop for modpack creators.
body:
Initially, I preferred Fabric over Forge because of its strong performance mods. However, Forge has a much larger library of available mods, which made me want to find a way to improve its performance. To address this gap, I created Performia, a lightweight performance modpack that matches or even surpasses the performance of popular Fabric mod packs.

**Key Features of Performia:**

- **Lightweight Design:** Optimized for smooth gameplay on a variety of hardware setups.

- **Broad Compatibility:** Performia is designed to work seamlessly with nearly all major Minecraft mods, making it an ideal choice for creating diverse and complex modpacks. Its compatibility ensures that you can combine your favorite mods without worrying about conflicts or performance issues, allowing you to craft unique and engaging Minecraft experiences.

- **Performance Enhancement:** Offers improvements comparable to or better than many Fabric performance mods, by carefully implementing varoius performance mods.

- **Unified Performance Solution:** Performia offers modders a single, comprehensive performance pack that they can easily download and integrate into their modpacks, allowing them to focus on bringing their unique vision to life without worrying about performance optimization.

**What This Means for You:**
Performia is great for modpack creators and players who want to get the most out of their Minecraft experience without giving up on mod variety. By closing the performance gap between Fabric and Forge, Performia lets you enjoy a wide range of mods without sacrificing performance, it conflicks with vanilla parity a bit.

**Terms of use**
You can dowload the Perfomance Modpack as a foundation for perfomance and then Customize it to your liking for example like [Trepidation Craft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trepidation-craft) after you made your modpack and you may upload it as your own. please credit my work in the gallery with a text or in the description you dont have to but it would be appreciated, you may not dowload this modpack and relabel as your own performance mod.


**!for Best perfomance use Half of you CPU threds for Chunk Update thread if you have 12 threads use 6, in the game settings. and CPU render ahead at half you threads so if 12 Threads use 6 FPS!**
